checks.evidence: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_locality_summary

checks.query: api_locality_summary WHERE province_id = ? ORDER BY name LIMIT 500
checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_api_locality_summary_province_name ON api_locality_summary(province_id, name_normalized)
checks.note: ORDER BY name puede requerir sort; para V11B conviene ordenar por name_normalized o aceptar sort acotado.

checks.query: api_locality_client_metrics WHERE locality_id = ? ORDER BY rank_net_sales LIMIT 50
checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_api_locality_client_loc_rank ON api_locality_client_metrics(locality_id, rank_net_sales)

checks.query: api_locality_top_products WHERE locality_id = ? ORDER BY rank_net_sales LIMIT 10
checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_api_locality_top_products_loc_rank ON api_locality_top_products(locality_id, rank_net_sales)
checks.note: Top products está precalculado; no escanear ventas crudas.
Resuelve detalle/resumen por cliente con una fila.

checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_postal_code_area_cp ON postal_code_area(postal_code)
checks.note: Código postal solo como señal auxiliar territorial.

checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alias_normalized ON territorial_alias(alias_normalized)
checks.note: LIKE puede usar índice solo con prefijo y collation compatible; imponer LIMIT y normalizar q.

checks.query: api_locality_month_summary WHERE locality_id = ? AND period_yyyymm BETWEEN ? AND ?
checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_api_locality_month_locality_period ON api_locality_month_summary(locality_id, period_yyyymm)
checks.note: Adecuado para serie mensual por localidad.

checks.query: api_locality_month_summary WHERE province_id = ? AND period_yyyymm BETWEEN ? AND ?
checks.evidence: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_api_locality_month_province_period ON api_locality_month_summary(province_id, period_yyyymm)
checks.note: Adecuado para resúmenes provinciales sin sale_monthly.

execution_note: Este script prepara EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN y valida cobertura de índices por schema. Ejecutar el SQL con Wrangler D1 local para ver el plan real.
